## Type of change

- [ ] 📚 Add reference (book or online resource)
- [ ] 🔗 Fix broken or outdated link
- [ ] ✏️ Improve clarity or wording
- [ ] 🐛 Fix inaccurate or outdated content
- [ ] ➕ Add missing TODO / checklist item
- [ ] 📖 Add new section or phase
- [ ] 🌐 Fix formatting / typo
- [ ] 🔧 Repo maintenance (templates, README, LICENSE)

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is general and technology-agnostic (not specific to a single framework or stack)
- [ ] All links I added are publicly accessible and working
- [ ] Any new reference includes: Title, Author, Year, and a brief reason for its inclusion
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
